questions: What is the cause of the toothache (e.g., dental caries, periodontal pocket, abrasion, attrition & erosion, peridontitis, third molar eruption, maxillary sinusitis, trigeminal neuralgia)?
Does the patient have any allergies? (Yes/No)
If choosing an antibiotic, is amoxicillin preferred? (Yes/No)
If choosing an analgesic/anti-inflammatory, is diclofenac potassium preferred? (Yes/No)
